overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through an industrial district with power plants, cooling towers, and factories. The player character walks along sidewalks, observes smokestacks, and crosses streets in a futuristic industrial zone with clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with power plant in distance

events.description: visual transition effect with ghosting indicates time skip

agents.ego_description: walking along industrial sidewalk observing the factory buildings and cooling towers ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete industrial structure with geometric architecture and multiple levels
large cylindrical cooling towers emitting white steam into the sky
network of electrical wires and transmission pylons crossing above the street
metal chain-link fence running along the right edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk in an industrial district. Massive industrial buildings line the left side while a chain-link fence runs along the right. In the distance, large cooling towers emit steam. Other pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk, and sparse vehicle traffic moves on the multi-lane road. A visual transition effect with ghosting occurs near the end, indicating a time skip.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with smokestacks visible ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing walk along sidewalk with industrial facilities on left and fence on right

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk carrying a bag

entered.detail: tall industrial chimneys emitting white smoke against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: Following the transition, the walk continues along the industrial street. Tall smokestacks become visible in the center distance, emitting white smoke. The industrial complex building on the left appears closer, while the cooling towers shift to the right side of the view. The pedestrian ahead continues walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: view of sky and smokestacks from below

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on smokestacks and sky
camera tilts back down to street level

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the industrial smokestacks against the sky, then continuing forward

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to focus on the tall smokestacks billowing white smoke against a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. Power lines crisscross the frame. The industrial building and fence temporarily exit the frame as the view focuses skyward, then the camera returns to street level, revealing the cooling towers and fence again.

agents.ego_description: walking toward an intersection with cooling towers visible ahead and industrial buildings on the left

entered.detail: elevated highway or bridge structure spanning across the horizon
traffic signal pole with red lights illuminated

segments.scene_description: The walk continues toward an intersection with an overpass bridge visible in the distance. The cooling towers now dominate the center view. A traffic light appears ahead showing red. The chain-link fence continues along the right side, now with overgrown vegetation visible behind it. The pedestrian ahead continues walking toward the crossing.

events.description: crossing the multi-lane street at the intersection
traffic light changes from red to green

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and approaching a massive industrial building with stacked geometric architecture

notable_agents.action: white car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: massive brutalist industrial building with stacked geometric concrete sections and red structural elements
tropical palm tree near the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character crossing the multi-lane intersection. A massive industrial facility with distinctive stacked architecture dominates the view ahead. A palm tree stands near the intersection corner. The traffic light changes from red to green as the character crosses. Vehicles pass through the intersection, and the earlier cooling towers and overpass recede behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a sprawling industrial district that evolves from a sidewalk walk into a crossing of a massive urban intersection. It begins along a concrete sidewalk flanked by industrial buildings and a chain-link fence, moving toward distant steaming cooling towers while pedestrians walk ahead. As a ghosting transition effect occurs, the perspective shifts further down the street where tall smokestacks emitting white smoke become prominent, prompting the camera to tilt upward toward the bright blue sky and crisscrossing power lines before returning to street level. The scene then progresses toward an intersection as the cooling towers dominate the center view and overgrown vegetation appears behind the fence. Finally, the camera crosses the multi-lane road as the traffic light turns green, leaving the overpass behind to face a massive industrial facility with stacked architecture and a solitary palm tree.
